name: Aarushi Kotwani
tagline: Data Professional with over two years of experience in data engineering, analytics, and dashboarding for finance and AI/ML projects. Proficient in SQL, Excel, and Tableau; automated ETL pipelines and built interactive dashboards that uncovered $80K+ in cost savings and boosted data processing efficiency by 35%. Skilled at collaborating with stakeholders to translate analytical insights into actionable recommendations and drive improved customer and business outcomes.
